claim_text: The system models exactly two operational roles — Importer and Approver — with no overlapping permissions
source_quote: Design a prototype for a dual-role system that enables:

claim_text: Operations specialist responsible for moving inbound transactional files into the review pipeline
source_quote: Importers to upload and review transaction files

claim_text: Decides which files to upload and in what order; cannot approve or reject individual transactions
Reviewer with authority to approve or reject individual transactions, and to export approved data
source_quote: Approvers to review, approve/reject, and export transactions

claim_text: Authoritative on approve / reject decisions for in-scope transactions; cannot upload files

A dual-role web application that ingests transactional files, presents the resulting transactions in a searchable, filterable table, and routes them through an approve-or-reject lifecycle with a defensible audit trail.
source_quote: Design a prototype for a dual-role system that enables:

claim_text: File-driven ingestion with a per-file log of upload, parse, and processing state
Transaction-level lifecycle with explicit states (imported, approved, rejected)
Role-based interaction constraints separating Importer and Approver permissions
Tabular transaction review with search, filter, and (optional but high-value) bulk selection
Mandatory reject-note capture as part of the rejection action
CSV export of the current filtered transaction set
